description.value:
Daylit blessing-lines from open-air shrines — Ljósamál shrine-keepers inscribe blessing-lines into open air at noon, tracing the sun's path with their fingertips; when those lines are etched into a blade, the steel never forgets the warmth and releases it on impact.

Effect: This weapon sheds faint light in a 1-square radius. Once per encounter, when you hit a creature with a strike using this weapon, you deal additional fire damage equal to your Reason score.

Rules: Encounter; Strike; Damage.

project.prerequisites: A weapon of at least quality craft; a blessing-strip inscribed at a Ljósamål open-air shrine at midday
